reasoning: OpenAI completed its massive, 18-month-long restructuring on October 28, 2025. The new structure established a non-profit foundation that retains governance and board appointment control over the new for-profit public benefit corporation. On October 29, the market creator explicitly stated that this new structure does not meet the "no longer controlled by a non-profit board" condition for a YES resolution. Because the restructuring was exceptionally complex, legally fraught, and only just finalized at the end of October, the probability of an entirely new corporate structure being executed and completed before the end of the year (in the remaining two months) is effectively zero. The market probability was 7% in late November, reflecting this reality, and the passage of additional time without further announcements pushes the likelihood down to the floor of estimated probabilities.
